title: Rambo 2
desc: Mayuri gets kidnapped when she is on a road trip with her friends, Krishna and DJ. However, the kidnapper releases her with a message for Krishna, whom he wants to kill.

title: Bagheera
desc: In a lawless land plagued by injustice and corruption, a police officer becomes a vigilante, protecting the innocent and punishing the guilty.

title: Sriramachandra
desc: Twins Srirama and Chandra are separated after their parents' divorce. When Srirama is killed by his greedy manager, he returns as a ghost and possesses his twin to exact revenge.

title: Bhroona
desc: Some of the villagers chance upon the temporary absence of a woman's husband and physically assault her, unbeknownst to the dire consequence that they would have to face.

title: Sidila Mari
desc: Ganganna and Ranga share a close, friendly bond with each other, but an accident between them causes Ranga to lose his life. Years later, Ranga's son seeks out Ganganna in order to exact revenge.

title: Aaradhane
desc: A religious leader performs sacred rituals and worships the idol of a Hindu deity while chanting holy hymns to seek divine blessings.

title: Teleshopping
desc: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Athi Aparoopa
desc: Upset due to his father's remarriage, Bharath leaves home. Eventually, he meets Aparna, a beautiful woman, and falls in love with her, unaware of her secret.

title: Bhupathi
desc: After Bhupathi's mother and niece are attacked by the thugs of his lover's father, he decides to take revenge and turn his back on his lady.

title: Preethsu Thappenilla
desc: A happy-go-lucky man falls head over heels in love with a girl at first sight. By a twist of fate, they become victims of a tragic incident, which takes their relationship to the next level.

title: Raghu Thatha
desc: A wish to fulfil her terminally ill grandfather's last desire and her stance against patriarchy sandwich Kayalvizhi Pandian, who must struggle to make the right choice.

title: Milana
desc: Anjali's father forces her to marry Akash. Unable to forget her past, she demands a divorce from Akash, but soon begins to fall for him.

title: Thavarina Siri
desc: Muttanna bravely navigates life's challenges to provide for his family while staying true to his humanitarian heart. Despite their struggles, he selflessly takes care of others.
